value.stringValue: Please make sure to select no more than 5 options

choices.name: AssociatePrincipalScientist
choices.choiceText: Associate Principal Scientist

choices.name: AssociatePrincipalScientistGenomics
choices.choiceText: Associate Principal Scientist (Genomics)

choices.name: BOMItemMasterDataLead
choices.choiceText: BOM/Item Master Data Lead

choices.name: LaboratorySupportAssociate
choices.choiceText: Laboratory Support Associate

choices.name: PrincipalScientist
choices.choiceText: Principal Scientist

choices.name: RegulatoryAffairsManager
choices.choiceText: Regulatory Affairs Manager

choices.name: SeniorHRBusinessPartner
choices.choiceText: Senior HR Business Partner

choices.name: SeniorOccupationalHealthNurse
choices.choiceText: Senior Occupational Health Nurse

choices.name: SignOutManager
choices.choiceText: Sign Out Manager

choices.name: SupplyChainAnalyst
choices.choiceText: Supply Chain Analyst

fields.name: Completion_Text
fields.fieldText:
Your application has been submitted.

Thank you! You have successfully registered your interest to work at Rosalind Franklin Laboratory. Our team will review your CV and will be in touch with you soon.


You may now close this window

fields.name: CV_Text
fields.fieldText:
CV Upload

Please upload your CV below:


Alert!

You will not be able to proceed without uploading a CV at this stage

fields.name: Drop_Out_Text
fields.fieldText: Thank you for visiting our talent page, unfortunately we are only taking in applicants who would like to work at Royal Leamington Spa at this time. Therefore we will not process your application at this stage but should you be interested in a role at the Rosalind Franklin Laboratory in Royal Leamington Spa in the future please revisit our portal for vacancies.

fields.name: Prescreen_Screen_Text_0
fields.fieldText:
Available Roles at Rosalind Franklin Laboratory

﻿As part of registering your interest a position at Rosalind Franklin Laboratory, we are offering a selection of all possible roles available at the lab. Role titles at the UKHSA Rosalind Franklin lab may be different. Click the title to read more about the role, however please ensure you apply for your position through this form as we are prioritising applications only submitted through this link.

fields.name: Roles
fields.fieldText: Which role/s would you like to apply for? You may choose up to 5 that best match your experience.

validationRule.errorMessage: Email must be in a valid format

fields.name: Please_tell_us_which_lab_you_have_worked_in
fields.fieldText: Please tell us which lab you have worked in:

fields.name: Confirm2
fields.fieldText: Please confirm you would like to work at the Rosalind Franklin Laboratory in Royal Leamington Spa. We are not accepting applications for other locations.

value.stringValue: We just need to verify you are human before submitting these details

fields.name: Welcome_Text
fields.fieldText:
Register your interest to work at one of Europe’s largest diagnostic laboratories, the UKHSA Rosalind Franklin Laboratory.


In line with the UK Government’s Living with Covid Plan, we are inviting expressions of interest to join the UKHSA Rosalind Franklin Laboratory in Royal Leamington Spa, using the form below.


To register your interest in full or part time roles at the UKHSA Rosalind Franklin Laboratory, please complete your application here.


Please note, you will be required to submit your CV as part of the application process.


As part of the recruitment process, you may be subject to recruitment checks in line with UK government screening, a Baseline Personnel Security Standard (BPSS) which comprises of verification for the following four main elements: Identity, Nationality and Immigration Status (including entitlement to work), Employment History (past 3 years) and Criminal Record (unspent convictions only). Should you during this process supply any false information or fail to disclose relevant information it could be grounds for refusal/dismissal and could amount to a criminal offence.
